column1: Hey Tyler, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
Cool I got you bro. which destination were you lookin to book
I believe it was the occidental
Word yea the Occidental Punta Cana. thats where I'll be too
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
some of us go to fau and some of us go to fsu
oh bet! we got groups from both schools rollin with us, bout to be lit
y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, were you lookin to get things booked today?
definitely get it booked by this weekend would just have to know prices for everything
yea I got you, ill send what we have at the moment and we'll go from there
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
yeah i got it thank you
bet lmk what the group thinks
they fw it, when would we have to book by?
asap brodie, things are selling out
bet lmk when you ready today and I'll set up the reservation and send it over
yoo Tyler whats good bro, did we wanna lock this in?
can we do 5 people and for 4 nights
yea so march 16-20? itll be a room of 3 and a room of 2
gonna make the reservation and send over rn. y'all ready to get squared away tonight?
also do you want me to even out the price so that everyone pays the same amount regardless of whose in the 2 person or 3 person?
technically the 2 person is more per person than the 3 person room. but Ican even it our for everyone at $629.40
nah it's good me and my boy know we gotta pay more for the 2 person room
one of the kids on accidently put his bday as the wrong date when filling it out is that gonna fuck him up
hey who was it and what's his correct birthday?
it was jayden danis and his correct one is march 13, 2007
whats the status of everyone else in the group? looks like youre the only one that secured a spot on the trip
yoyo any update on Jayden Walter and Charles? operations is going to remove them if they don't see any activity on their accounts
jayden and walter are paying today in full and then once charles gets his money refunded from an air bnb he bought he is paying he said he gets it refunded today or tomorrow
word just need them to get squared away asap so they dont lose their spots
things are slim rn. everyone wants the last rooms avail
I think everyone has paid except for one now
word ops just hmu again about him
said he was getting deleted soon
tell him run dont walk lol
yooo whenever you get a chance, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so that we can coordinate airport transfers for the group
yoo whats up bro, we need everyones flight info uploaded to their accounts asap
yerr still need that flight info or you'll have to pay for your own transportation
T whats good bro, are Drew and Charles still going on the trip
yeah sorry my messages on mute
bet all good, just need their flight info asap. they on the same flight as you?
yoyo any word on Charles' flight info
